description: Case style: White plastic round case with a fixed bezel Dial style: White dial with silver and white hands and red indices Strap style: Red textured plastic strap with a tang clasp Features: Branding on the 12 hour mark and a screw to reset time Water resistance to 10 BAR, wearable around sinks, during swimming, poolside diving but not highboard diving and surfing Warranty: 1 year
